gpssampling 0.2.0

Generate all maps and optionally save to files

Source: R/sampling_map.R
map_all_communities.Rd

Creates per-community maps (primary + secondary, batch-colored) and an overview map. Always returns the ggplot objects. Optionally saves as PNG files.

Usage

map_all_communities(
  samples_list,
  communities_sf,
  community_id_col = "name",
  out_dir = NULL,
  buffer_radius = 50,
  width = 10,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300,
  ...
)

Arguments

samples_list

Output of sample_communities() or split_batches().

communities_sf

Community polygons (sf).

community_id_col

Column name for community ID.

out_dir

Optional output directory. If provided, maps are saved as PNG. If NULL, maps are only returned.

buffer_radius

Buffer radius in meters. Default 50.

width

Plot width in inches. Default 10.

height

Plot height in inches. Default 12.

dpi

Plot resolution. Default 300.

...

Additional arguments passed to map_community() (colors, basemap, etc.).

Value

A named list of ggplot objects: overview, {name}_primary, {name}_secondary for each community.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
maps <- map_all_communities(
  samples, communities,
  community_id_col = "name",
  out_dir = "output/maps"
)
} # }
